zh.lifeSummary: 當Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan於大約1325年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾時，他的父親Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan22歲，母親Angharad Verch Gruffudd26歲。他和Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill至少有9個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1400年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan于大约1325年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾时，他的父亲Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan22岁，母亲Angharad Verch Gruffudd26岁。他和Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill至少有9个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1400年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Vychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Meurig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

variants.name: Meuric
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

en.lifeSummary: When Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan was born about 1325, in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales, his father, Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan, was 22 and his mother, Angharad Verch Gruffudd, was 26. He had at least 9 sons and 3 daughters with Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill. He died before 1400.

fr.Dolgelly, Merionethshire, , Wales,: Dolgelly, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan est né environ 1325, à Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Angharad Verch Gruffudd, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles avec Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill. Il est décédé avant 1400.

de.lifeSummary: Als Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan um 1325 in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan 22 und seine Mutter Angharad Verch Gruffudd 26. Er hatte mit Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1400.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan è nato il circa 1325 nel Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Galles, il suo padre, Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Angharad Verch Gruffudd, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie con Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill. Morì prima del 1400.

ja.lifeSummary: Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychanが約1325年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアナナウ ハルで生まれた時，父Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychanは22歳，母Angharad Verch Gruffuddは26歳であった。彼はMallt ferch Hywel Pickhillとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1400年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan(이)가 대략 1325년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 나나 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Verch Gruffudd(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Angharad Verch Gruffudd, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas com Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill. Ele faleceu antes 1400.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan родился около 1325 г. в местности наннау холл, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad Verch Gruffudd, 26. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери от Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill. Он умер перед 1400 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan nació aproximadamente 1325, en Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Meurig Vychan ap Ynyr Vychan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Angharad Verch Gruffudd, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas con Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill. Murió antes de 1400.
